summary: Drop pin and ripple pulse animation map component for Remotion.

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/map-pin-drop/src/MapPinDrop.tsx` into your Remotion project, import `MapPinDrop` and `mapPinDropDefaultProps`, then register the `MapPinDrop` composition with duration 120, fps 30, width 1920, and height 1080.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Map Pin Drop Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/map-pin-drop to my project. Preserve the exported MapPinDropProps API and register the MapPinDrop composition with the default props.
